_readme: Every Layer B tunable, listed at its default value. Edit and restart the orchestrator.
Precedence per knob: environment variable (the old names still work) > this file > built-in default.
Fail-soft: delete or break this file and the robot runs on built-in defaults.
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY stays an environment variable on purpose - never put secrets in this file.
audio.espeak_voice: mb-us1 (US female) / mb-us2, mb-us3 (US male) / mb-en1 (British male); `espeak --voices=mb` lists what's installed.
audio.gain: digital mic amplification for low-gain USB mics (see audio_nodes.py).
audio.heard_min_confidence: STT decodes below this mean word confidence are dropped as noise (stop/halt always pass).
audio.heard_min_snr: an utterance's peak level must exceed this multiple of the ambient noise floor.
companion.chat_noise_quality / chat_min_quality: below the first = silent drop, between = soft 'I didn't catch that' with no LLM call (see speech_match.quality_score).
health.battery_adc: direct ADC battery fallback for setups without world_state - leave false normally (I2C contention).
bluetooth.connect_cmd: {mac} is replaced with the device's MAC address.
kinematics.*: physical robot properties used by the smooth steering controller - measure wheelbase_mm on your chassis; steering_rate_deg_per_sec caps commanded slew (lower = smoother arcs).

steering.area_distance_k: bounding-box-area -> distance calibration (distance_cm ~ k / sqrt(area_ratio)); place an obstacle at a known distance and set k = distance_cm * sqrt(area_ratio). See steering_controller.py.
steering.clearance_m / curve_slowdown_gain: preferred lateral passing clearance, and how hard speed drops with steering angle (0 = never, 1 = full lock means min speed).
